rag_rules: Use assign for output feature or auxiliary variable declarations in implementation scope only.
Place guarantee statements only at the component level, not in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations.
Align helper declaration types with actual expression types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE.
Employ AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements within implementation scope.
Avoid mismatched types in helper declarations and expressions.
